creator: rsimmons0@gmail.com
text:
I got some good feedback about this patch.  I have made a new one that
corrected my missing "\".  Also, it was indicated that since this
patch is meant to fix a problem, I should not also change the default
behavior of the port in the same patch.  I've removed that change, so
this patch simply fixes the problem of the dead mirror and the problem
with configure finding BDB.
